task_completion.description: Open EdrawMax and start a UML Component Diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is open, showing a canvas with UML component diagram tools or shapes available in the sidebar.
The text 'E-Commerce Microservices Component Diagram' is visible at the top of the canvas.

task_completion.description: Create the six required microservice components
task_completion.visual_evidence: Six distinct UML component shapes are on the canvas, labeled: API Gateway, User Service, Product Catalog (or Product Catalog Service), Order Service, Payment Service, and Notification Service.

task_completion.description: Add dependency relationships from the API Gateway
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dependency arrows (typically dashed lines with open arrowheads) point from the API Gateway component to the User Service, Product Catalog Service, and Order Service components.

task_completion.description: Add dependency relationships from the Order Service
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dependency arrows point from the Order Service component to the Payment Service, Product Catalog Service, and Notification Service components.

task_completion.description: Include interface symbols for APIs and data access
task_completion.visual_evidence: UML interface symbols (such as lollipop/provided interface or socket/required interface shapes) are attached to the components.

task_completion.description: Save as EDDX and export as PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: Save and Export dialog boxes showing the file paths '/home/ga/Documents/ecommerce_component_diagram.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/ecommerce_component_diagram.png', or a file manager showing these files successfully created.

integrity.description: Agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking, dragging shapes, and typing text within the EdrawMax interface, rather than using terminal commands to generate the files.
The trajectory shows the diagram being constructed step-by-step (adding one shape/connector at a time) rather than a fully completed diagram suddenly appearing.

integrity.description: Files were exported using the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the 'File -> Save' and 'File -> Export' menus in EdrawMax to produce the final outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected EDDX path: /home/ga/Documents/ecommerce_component_diagram.eddx. Expected PNG path: /home/ga/Documents/ecommerce_component_diagram.png. Required components: 'API Gateway', 'User Service', 'Product Catalog', 'Order Service', 'Payment Service', 'Notification Service'. Required title: 'E-Commerce Microservices Component Diagram'.
